title: thesium impressum var. kotschyanum
intro: Thesium impressum var. kotschyanum, also known as Kotschyan's woolly thyme, is a variety of flowering plant in the Thesium genus, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Kotschyan's woolly thyme include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Thesium impressum var. kotschyanum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical and internal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
